nasb.text: “Our father died in the wilderness, yet he was not among the company of those who gathered themselves together against the Lord in the company of Korah; but he died in his own sin, and he had no sons.

esv.text: “Our father died in the wilderness. He was not among the company of those who gathered themselves together against the Lord  in the company of Korah, but died for his own sin. And he had no sons.

cnv.text: “我們的父親死在曠野，他並不是在那聚集攻擊耶和華的人之中，不屬可拉一黨的人；他死在自己的罪中，只是他沒有兒子。

ccb.text: “我们的父亲死在旷野，他并没有跟可拉一伙一起反叛耶和华，而是因自己的罪而死，没有留下儿子。
